status.lastRecouple: Day 21 (Ep 21) — Casa Amor ends: Kenzie+Dylan, Corbin+Parmida, Jen+Gal, Caleb+Jaiden, KC+Tierra; Bryce+Trinity, Sincere+Melanie, Zach+Kayda stayed loyal
status.lastDumping: Sol Mýa & Gabriel Vasconcelos (Day 14 / Ep 14, Jun 18) — girls voted Gabriel out, boys voted Sol out
status.pendingVote: Movie Night (Ep 25) airs TONIGHT — Jun 30 at 9 PM ET. Islanders watch secret villa clips. Kenzie/Gal, KC/Casa Amor, and more are about to be exposed.

islanders.name: Trinity Tatum
islanders.traits: Self-assured, playful and unafraid to flirt; calls herself 'the prize.'
islanders.strength: Knows what she wants and goes for it; Bryce made it official in Ep 24 — a sailboat and champagne.
islanders.crit: Took 24 days to get the girlfriend title, but she waited it out.
islanders.story: Picked Bryce on night one; survived every vote, challenge, and Casa Amor together. In Ep 24, Bryce asked her to be his girlfriend on a jet ski date — officially the villa's longest-standing couple.

islanders.name: Bryce Dettloff
islanders.traits: Laid-back, sweet and steady; the calm one of the villa. Older and more settled than most.
islanders.strength: Finally took the leap — asked Trinity to be his girlfriend on Ep 24's sailboat date.
islanders.crit: Took his time (maybe too long for Trinity), but he got there.
islanders.story: Oldest original islander; chose Trinity from night one. Had wandering eyes toward Kayda early on but stayed loyal through Casa Amor. Made it official with Trinity in Ep 24.

islanders.name: Gabriel Vasconcelos
islanders.traits: Trilingual charmer bringing 'Brazilian fire'; making out is his love language.
islanders.strength: Warm and magnetic — connected quickly with whoever he was with.
islanders.crit: The girls voted him out because he was 'not settling in for anyone' and kept going for the next arrival.
islanders.story: Left single Day 1, coupled with Beatriz Day 5, kissed both Jen and Sol on Day 8. America's vote gave him Jen. In the Day 14 vote, the girls chose to dump him — citing his pattern of chasing new arrivals.

islanders.name: Beatriz Hatz
islanders.traits: Paralympic bronze medalist (long jump T64); confident but introspective.
islanders.strength: Self-aware and direct about what she needs from a partner.
islanders.crit: Her insecurities about Gabriel proved well-founded.
islanders.story: Coupled with Sean, then Gabriel — but America's Day 9 vote handed Gabriel to Jen. Left in the bottom three, she wasn't saved by Corbin and was dumped from the villa.

islanders.name: Sincere Rhea
islanders.traits: Cheesy, name-proud flirt who 'likes the chase'; wears his emotions openly.
islanders.strength: Both he and Melanie stayed loyal through Casa Amor — a rare feat this season.
islanders.crit: Amora's return is testing him; his body language around her is giving the villa pause.
islanders.story: On-and-off with Melanie from Day 1. Both survived Casa Amor loyal. But Amora came back via fan vote and is creating new tension with her pointed interest in Sincere. Movie Night could expose more.

islanders.name: Melanie Moreno
islanders.traits: Brings Dominican flair; bold, flirty and not afraid to stir the pot.
islanders.strength: Stayed loyal through Casa Amor despite Corey's pursuit — one of the season's cleaner loyalty stories.
islanders.crit: Amora's return is hovering over her relationship with Sincere, and she knows it.
islanders.story: Rocky road from Day 1 with Sincere. Corbin saved her after Day 9 vote. Both she and Sincere returned from Casa Amor single and loyal. Now watching Amora's return with one eye open.

islanders.name: KC Chandler
islanders.traits: Cheeky healthcare worker who jokes 'women love men in scrubs.'
islanders.strength: Found a genuine spark with Tierra in Casa Amor and committed to it.
islanders.crit: Aniya called him a coward in Ep 24 for choosing Tierra — and the villa agrees he handled the split badly. Movie Night could reveal what he said about Aniya behind closed doors.
islanders.story: Steady with Aniya from Day 1 until Casa Amor, where he chose bombshell Tierra. Devastating to Aniya, and he laughed with Tierra at the firepit over her reaction. In Ep 24, Aniya publicly rejected him and the two are done.

islanders.name: Aniya Harvey
islanders.traits: Daughter of NBA player Donnell Harvey; 'a bit competitive' but friendly and 'so extra.'
islanders.strength: Graceful under pressure — stayed loyal through Casa Amor only for KC to choose Tierra. Then Carl walked in and gave her exactly what KC couldn't.
islanders.crit: Was hoping to reunite with KC — the Casa Amor betrayal hit hard.
islanders.story: Paired with KC night one. Stayed loyal through Casa Amor (despite Corey's pursuit) while KC chose Tierra. Nearly had a panic attack. Carl's return via the fan vote gave her a fresh start — and in Ep 24 she publicly rejected KC and began building something with Carl.

islanders.name: Zach Georgiou
islanders.traits: British charm; brother of S7 bombshell Charlie Georgiou. Has a cat named Lolo.
islanders.strength: The Caleb threat pushed him and Kayda to communicate — they came out stronger for it.
islanders.crit: His early jealousy over the Caleb/Kayda chats made Kayda question his security.
islanders.story: Coupled with Kenzie Day 1, lost her to Corbin Day 5. Then picked by Kayda. Survived the Caleb flirtation tension before Casa Amor — and both returned loyal. One of the season's most solid pairs.

islanders.name: Kayda Reese Bosse
islanders.traits: Former HS basketball shooting guard (5'9"); left NYC modeling for a slower pace.
islanders.strength: Honest with Zach about her feelings for Caleb — and chose him anyway. Both returned from Casa Amor loyal.
islanders.crit: Told Caleb she was open to exploring other connections — she rescinded it but Zach's jealousy flared.
islanders.story: Bombshell who chose Zach at Day 5 recoupling. Pre-Casa Amor, Caleb's flirtation pulled at her and she admitted openness to exploring. But she and Zach returned from Casa Amor single and loyal — reaffirmed by their shared choice.

islanders.name: Corbin Mims
islanders.traits: Fitness content creator and co-owner of a Turks & Caicos villa-rental business; Stetson marketing grad.
islanders.strength: Chose Parmida through Casa Amor and in Ep 24 both confirmed they want no one else.
islanders.crit: Said things about Kenzie in Casa Amor that she hasn't forgiven; his apology in Ep 24 fell flat. Movie Night may surface the receipts.
islanders.story: Three recoupling changes in 24 days: Kenzie→Melanie (Day 9 save)→Kenzie again (Day 13 Love Letter)→Parmida (Casa Amor). He apologised to Kenzie in Ep 24 but she rejected it. He and Parmida are now the villa's most deliberate new pairing.

islanders.name: Kenzie Annis
islanders.traits: Graduated nursing school two days before the villa; 'starving for some boys' after 18 months single.
islanders.strength: Knows what she feels — turned down Corbin's apology cold and kissed Gal right after.
islanders.crit: Four partners in 24 days: Zach→Caleb (vote)→Corbin (letter)→Dylan (Casa Amor)→now Gal. The whiplash is real.
islanders.story: Swapped couplings four times. At Casa Amor she paired with Dylan. But in Ep 24, pulled Gal aside and kissed him — blowing up both her coupling with Dylan and Jen+Gal in the same moment. Going into Movie Night single and electric.

islanders.name: Sol Mýa
islanders.traits: Fashion model who also paints, writes and sings; 'doesn't have a problem getting guys.'
islanders.strength: Fearless and competitive — came to win and said so without apology.
islanders.crit: Boys voted her out citing her confrontational energy; her explosive lecture to Sincere sealed her fate.
islanders.story: Entered Day 6. America's vote coupled her with Sincere (Day 9). In Ep 13 the Love Letter recoupling paired her with Caleb. In Ep 14, she delivered a scorched-earth lecture to Sincere ('you pee on my leg and told me it's raining') — then the boys voted to dump her.

islanders.name: Jen Terry
islanders.traits: Pro model (Guess, SKIMS, Tecovas) working NY/LA/Miami.
islanders.strength: Knows her worth — walked away from Gal cleanly when he kissed Kenzie.
islanders.crit: Gabriel (Day 9-14) then Gal (Days 21-24): both choices ended in the guy moving on. She deserves better.
islanders.story: Entered Day 6 and America's vote gave her Gabriel. After his dumping she was single, then coupled with Casa Amor's Gal. But in Ep 24 Gal kissed Kenzie — a messy public split. Jen goes into Movie Night single and ready for whatever comes out.

islanders.name: Caleb McDaniel
islanders.traits: Charleston-based model (Home Depot campaigns) and gym devotee.
islanders.strength: Found a real, uncomplicated connection with Jaiden in Casa Amor — chosen deliberately after weeks of chaos.
islanders.crit: The Kayda flirtation pre-Casa Amor is a storyline Movie Night could revisit.
islanders.story: Youngest in the villa. Kenzie→Sol (letter)→single (Sol dumped). Before Casa Amor, Kayda told him she was open to something. He went to Casa Amor and chose Jaiden — who he brought back confidently. Going into Movie Night settled with Jaiden.

islanders.name: Sean Reifel
islanders.traits: Police officer and dad to a young son; the steady, caring type.
islanders.strength: Emotionally supportive — 'I'll help you sift through it.'
islanders.crit: Couldn't build a strong enough connection to survive the first vote.
islanders.story: Coupled with Beatriz night one, but she chose Gabriel at the Day 5 recoupling, leaving Sean single. Dumped from the villa Day 6.

islanders.name: Vasana Montgomery
islanders.traits: Originally cast as an OG islander.
islanders.story: Removed from the cast before entering the villa (May 29) after videos surfaced of her using racist language. Never appeared in the villa.

islanders.name: Gal Tshnieder
islanders.traits: Laid-back surf entrepreneur from LA; brings relaxed West Coast energy and a genuine, quiet confidence.
islanders.strength: Effortlessly likable — Kenzie was drawn to him during the Casa Amor split and then again after he arrived in the main villa.
islanders.crit: Kissed Kenzie while still coupled with Jen — created instant chaos on his arrival night.
islanders.story: Entered Casa Amor as a bombshell. Jen chose him at the recoupling. Entered the main villa in Day 21. But in Ep 24, Kenzie pulled him aside and they kissed — triggering a messy split with Jen. Goes into Movie Night in the middle of a triangle.

islanders.name: Dylan Wrona
islanders.traits: Model signed with Wilhelmina who uprooted his life to pursue his career; confident but genuine.
islanders.strength: Made a real connection with Kenzie at Casa Amor that brought him into the main villa.
islanders.crit: Was blindsided by Kenzie's kiss with Gal — left without a partner going into Movie Night.
islanders.story: Entered Casa Amor as a bombshell. Kenzie chose him at the recoupling. Entered the main villa Day 21. But in Ep 24 Kenzie kissed Gal, leaving Dylan on the outside looking in. Now single and processing.

islanders.name: Jaiden Bacciocco
islanders.traits: Fresh-faced ASU grad who believes couples in the villa were 'getting too comfortable too fast.'
islanders.strength: Grounded and warm — fits Caleb's easygoing energy well and entered the main villa as a settled pair.
islanders.crit: Newest face in the villa; hasn't had to face a real vote yet.
islanders.story: Entered Casa Amor as a bombshell and caught Caleb's attention. He chose to bring her back to the main villa at the Day 21 recoupling. Quietly building something genuine with the youngest original islander.

islanders.name: Parmida Keshani
islanders.traits: Fitness-focused and direct — she plans to call things out and says couples are closing themselves off too early.
islanders.strength: Clear communication and shared ambition with Corbin; both confirmed in Ep 24 they have eyes for no one else.
islanders.crit: Entered mid-game via Casa Amor; the villa hasn't fully tested her yet. Movie Night may show what was said behind closed doors.
islanders.story: Entered Casa Amor as a bombshell. Corbin chose to bring her back over returning single. In Ep 24, both confirmed no interest in other connections. The most explicitly committed new pairing in the villa.

islanders.name: Tierra Davis
islanders.traits: Warm-hearted nanny who works with kids; nurturing by nature and not intimidated by the villa's social games.
islanders.strength: Brought KC out of his shell; their Casa Amor spark was undeniable enough for him to blow up a seven-week OG coupling.
islanders.crit: The villa hasn't forgotten that KC laughed with her at the firepit when Aniya cried. Movie Night could surface more.
islanders.story: Casa Amor bombshell chosen by KC over loyal Aniya. Entered the main villa Day 21. Has stayed close to KC through the Aniya drama. Going into Movie Night, the question is what Casa Amor footage might reveal about KC's comments.

islanders.name: Carl Schmidt
islanders.traits: Denver personal trainer who had the toughest Casa Amor journey — connected with Aniya's energy and went for it when given a second chance.
islanders.strength: Got a second chance via the fan vote and used it immediately — connected with a heartbroken Aniya who needed exactly what he brings.
islanders.crit: Was dumped once already; needs to show the connection with Aniya is more than mutual timing and gratitude.
islanders.story: Casa Amor bombshell who was dumped at the recoupling (Aniya chose to stay loyal to KC). Brought back by America in Megan Thee Stallion's Day 23 twist. Walked in to find Aniya heartbroken — and the two began exploring a genuine fresh start.

islanders.name: Amora Cacheé
islanders.traits: Unapologetically herself — a Miami-to-Atlanta student who goes after what she wants and came back to the villa with unfinished business.
islanders.strength: America voted her back in for a reason — she brings energy and tension in equal measure.
islanders.crit: Her presence is already causing turbulence around Sincere and Melanie. Going into Movie Night, she's the most dangerous wildcard in the villa.
islanders.story: Casa Amor bombshell who was dumped when no boy picked her. America voted her back in alongside Carl via Megan Thee Stallion's Day 23 twist. Her return has reignited tension in the villa — particularly around Sincere — and Movie Night is only going to amplify that.

couples.how: Trinity was the only woman to pick Bryce on night one. 24 days later, Bryce asked her to be his girlfriend on a sailboat date outside the villa.
couples.events: Survived every vote, challenge, and Casa Amor intact. In Ep 24, Bryce made it official with a champagne toast on a sailboat — first official couple of Season 8.

couples.how: Kayda chose Zach at the Day 5 girls' recoupling after Corbin took Kenzie.
couples.events: Navigated the Caleb flirtation triangle before Casa Amor. Both returned from Casa Amor single and loyal — reaffirmed by choosing each other again.

couples.how: Reunited after Day 9 vote (Sincere to Sol, Melanie to Corbin) when Corbin's save gave Melanie to him instead.
couples.events: Both stayed loyal through Casa Amor. But Amora's return is hovering over the couple — her pointed interest in Sincere is Movie Night kindling.

couples.how: KC chose Tierra at the Casa Amor recoupling over loyal Aniya — a decision that devastated the villa.
couples.events: KC and Tierra laughed at the firepit when Aniya cried. In Ep 24, Aniya publicly rejected KC calling him a coward. Movie Night could surface what KC said about Aniya in Casa Amor.

couples.how: Caleb brought Jaiden back from Casa Amor — a deliberate choice after weeks of being caught in other people's triangles.
couples.events: Entered the main villa as one of the cleanest Casa Amor pairings. The Kayda/Caleb pre-Casa Amor tension is a dormant thread Movie Night could revisit.

couples.how: Corbin brought Parmida back from Casa Amor after a strong connection during the split.
couples.events: Corbin's Ep 24 apology to Kenzie failed. He and Parmida confirmed exclusive intent — the most deliberate new pairing in the villa. But Movie Night may reveal what he said about Kenzie in Casa Amor.

couples.how: When Megan Thee Stallion brought Carl back via fan vote, he walked in to find a heartbroken Aniya — and they immediately began building something real.
couples.events: Aniya publicly rejected KC in Ep 24 ('coward'), signalling she's fully moved on. Carl and Aniya's connection is new but grounded in mutual need and mutual choice.

timeline.title: First Coupling
notes: 6 men, 5 women (Vasana removed pre-villa). Gabriel left single.

pairs.txt: Trinity → Bryce (only woman to pick him)

timeline.title: Bombshells Arrive
notes: Corbin & Kayda enter as the first bombshells.

timeline.title: First Recoupling (girls' choice)
notes: Corbin picked first despite girls' night. Sean left single.

timeline.title: Dumping + 3 Bombshells
notes: Sean dumped (single). Sol, Jen & Caleb storm the slumber-party challenge.

pairs.txt: Sol enters — eyes Corbin, KC, Sincere
Jen enters — 'here to take a man'

timeline.title: America's Vote Recoupling + Dumping
notes: First fan vote: Caleb+Kenzie, Gabriel+Jen, Sincere+Sol. Corbin saves Melanie. Beatriz dumped.

timeline.title: Love Letter Recoupling
notes: Islanders write letters to their desired partner. Mutual letters auto-couple; unmatched go single.

timeline.title: Double Dumping — Sol & Gabriel
notes: Girls vote Gabriel; boys vote Sol. Both gone Day 14.

pairs.txt: Gabriel dumped — girls: 'not settling for anyone'
Sol dumped — boys' vote after explosive lecture to Sincere

timeline.title: Casa Amor Split
notes: Boys sneak to Casa Amor with 6 new girls. 12 male bombshells enter main villa for the OG girls.

pairs.txt: Kenzie ⇄ Dylan (Casa Amor — Kenzie kissed Gal Ep 24)
Alannah Keyser removed from Casa Amor (Ep 20)

timeline.title: Megan Thee Stallion Twist
notes: America votes to bring back one dumped Casa Amor girl and one boy. Carl & Amora return.

pairs.txt: Carl returns — connects with heartbroken Aniya
Amora returns — unfinished business, eyes on Sincere

timeline.title: Official & Messy
notes: Trinity+Bryce go official. Kenzie kisses Gal. Jen+Gal split. Aniya rejects KC.

pairs.txt: Bryce asks Trinity to be his girlfriend — she says yes
Kenzie pulls Gal aside and they kiss — chaos
Jen+Gal split after Gal kissed Kenzie
Aniya publicly calls KC a coward — done

drama.title: Five couples form on night one
drama.sum: A doors-and-questions game set the first five couples. Gabriel was the odd man out, left single.
drama.out: First couples locked: Trinity+Bryce, Sean+Beatriz, Sincere+Melanie, Zach+Kenzie, KC+Aniya.

drama.title: Vasana Montgomery removed pre-villa
drama.sum: Days before premiere, videos surfaced of Vasana using racist language. Peacock cut her from the cast.
drama.out: Never entered the villa; villa opened with 11 islanders.

drama.title: Double bombshell twist
drama.sum: Corbin and Kayda entered during the first challenge, immediately shaking the original couplings.
drama.out: Both set their sights on taken islanders (Kenzie and Zach).

drama.title: Sincere & Melanie's volatile streak
drama.sum: The couple cycled through repeated arguments ('left, right and sideways') before reconciling.
drama.out: Stayed together — for now.

drama.title: First recoupling reshuffles the villa
drama.ppl: Beatriz, Gabriel, Corbin, Kenzie, Kayda, Zach, Sean
drama.sum: Girls' choice night — but bombshell Corbin picked first. Beatriz left Sean for Gabriel; Corbin took Kenzie; Kayda took Zach.
drama.out: Sean left without a partner and vulnerable.

drama.title: Sean dumped from the villa
drama.sum: Left single after Beatriz recoupled with Gabriel, Sean was dumped and sent home immediately.
drama.out: First eliminated islander of S8. Villa down to 12.

drama.title: Paint-challenge kiss sparks jealousy
drama.sum: Blindfolded, Melanie locked Sincere and Corbin into a long back-and-forth kissing loop, infuriating Sincere.
drama.out: Cracks reopen in Sincere & Melanie.

drama.title: KC's 'blessed' comment
drama.sum: KC joked he felt 'blessed' by the bombshell arrivals; Aniya bluntly told him it wasn't funny.
drama.out: Tension in a previously steady couple.

drama.title: Triple bombshell storms the slumber party
drama.ppl: Sol Mýa, Jen Terry, Caleb McDaniel
drama.sum: Sol, Jen and Caleb crashed the lingerie challenge. Sol singled out Corbin, KC and Sincere; Caleb met the girls.
drama.out: Honeymoon phase declared over; first public vote teased.

drama.title: First public vote announced
drama.sum: Ariana announced the season's first interactive fan vote via the Love Island app.
drama.out: Power shifts to viewers — results pending.

drama.title: First public recoupling vote opens
drama.sum: Viewers vote to pair the three new bombshells. Voting opened 10:30pm ET.
drama.out: Results delayed to Ep 9 after app issues.

drama.title: Gabriel kisses BOTH Jen and Sol
drama.sum: Gabriel chatted up both new bombshells and kissed each of them, then told Beatriz to her face.
drama.out: Gabriel & Beatriz crack wide open; her insecurity confirmed.

drama.title: America's first vote recouples the villa
drama.sum: America paired the bombshells: Caleb with Kenzie, Gabriel with Jen, and Sincere with Sol — blowing up three established couples.
drama.out: Corbin, Beatriz & Melanie left at the bottom and vulnerable.

drama.title: Beatriz Hatz dumped from the villa
drama.sum: After Gabriel was voted to Jen and Corbin saved Melanie, Beatriz was the odd woman out of the bottom three.
drama.out: Second islander eliminated. Villa down to 14.

drama.title: Dessert game turns sour on Sol
drama.sum: A dessert-themed game of truths unraveled — the boys called Sol an 'asshole' and Beatriz said the pies she got should've gone to Melanie.
drama.out: Sol cemented as the villa's lightning rod.

drama.title: Love Letter Recoupling
drama.ppl: Kenzie, Corbin, Caleb, Sol + all islanders
drama.sum: Each islander wrote a love letter to their chosen partner. Mutual letters auto-coupled them; Kenzie chose Corbin over Caleb, pairing Sol with Caleb.
drama.out: New couples: Kenzie+Corbin, Sol+Caleb. Trinity+Bryce, Kayda+Zach, KC+Aniya, Sincere+Melanie, Jen+Gabriel all stayed.

drama.title: Double Dumping — Sol & Gabriel
drama.sum: The girls voted to dump Gabriel ('not settling in for anyone — always going for the next bombshell'). The boys voted Sol out after her scorched-earth lecture to Sincere — 'You pee on my leg and told me it's raining!'
drama.out: Villa shaken; Caleb and Jen both single. Third and fourth islanders eliminated.

drama.title: Sol's nuclear exit speech to Sincere
drama.sum: Before the vote result, Sol confronted Sincere with zero filter — accused him of leading her on and delivering one of the season's most quotable exit speeches.
drama.out: Sol dumped; Sincere and Melanie intact but shaken.

drama.title: Kayda gives Caleb a green light
drama.ppl: Kayda Reese Bosse, Caleb McDaniel, Zach Georgiou
drama.sum: Single after Sol's dumping, Caleb pulls Kayda. She explicitly tells him she's open to exploring a connection outside her couple with Zach — while Zach is watching from across the villa.
drama.out: Zach confronts Kayda; tension rises before Casa Amor.

drama.title: Casa Amor begins — boys disappear overnight
drama.sum: The OG boys sneaked out of the villa during the 'Hearts on Fire' challenge and headed to Casa Amor, where six new female bombshells were waiting. Back in the main villa, 12 male bombshells arrived for the girls.
drama.out: Casa Amor is live. The split is official.

drama.title: Alannah Keyser removed from Casa Amor
drama.sum: During Casa Amor, Alannah was removed from the villa. Narrator Iain Stirling informed viewers after a commercial break that she had left.
drama.out: Casa Amor girl count reduced.

drama.title: Casa Amor ends — massive reshuffling
drama.sum: The OG islanders faced the Casa Amor recoupling. KC chose Tierra over loyal Aniya; Corbin brought Parmida; Caleb brought Jaiden; Jen chose Gal; Kenzie chose Dylan. Trinity+Bryce, Sincere+Melanie, and Kayda+Zach all stayed loyal.
drama.out: Aniya left single and devastated. KC and Tierra laughed at the firepit. Three OG couples proved strongest.

drama.title: KC and Tierra laugh as Aniya breaks down
drama.ppl: KC Chandler, Aniya Harvey, Tierra Davis
drama.sum: After KC chose Tierra at the recoupling, Aniya had a near-panic attack while Melanie tried to calm her down. KC and Tierra were seen laughing at the firepit about Aniya's reaction.
drama.out: KC's standing in the villa collapses; Aniya becomes the underdog the villa rallies around.

drama.title: Megan Thee Stallion's cake surprise — Carl & Amora return
drama.sum: Megan Thee Stallion appeared and two dumped Casa Amor islanders popped out of a cake. America had voted Carl and Amora back in. Aniya cheered loudest for Carl.
drama.out: Carl reconnects with Aniya. Amora's return sparks unease around Sincere and Melanie.

drama.title: Bryce makes Trinity his official girlfriend
drama.sum: On the season's first date outside the villa — a jet ski ride and sailboat champagne toast — Bryce asked Trinity to be his girlfriend. She said yes.
drama.out: Season 8's first official relationship confirmed.

drama.title: Kenzie kisses Gal — Jen+Gal split
drama.ppl: Kenzie Annis, Gal Tshnieder, Jen Terry, Dylan Wrona
drama.sum: Kenzie pulled Gal aside for a chat and they kissed — while Gal was coupled with Jen and Kenzie was with Dylan. Both couplings imploded immediately.
drama.out: Jen single, Dylan single, Gal and Kenzie exploring, Movie Night incoming.

drama.title: Aniya rejects KC publicly: 'You're a coward'
drama.sum: Aniya and KC sat down in Ep 24 to address their split. Aniya told him directly that he was a coward for how he handled things — and walked away.
drama.out: KC and Aniya fully done. KC remains with Tierra. Aniya now focused on Carl.

drama.title: Corbin+Parmida confirm exclusivity; Kenzie rejects apology
drama.ppl: Corbin Mims, Parmida Keshani, Kenzie Annis
drama.sum: Corbin tried to apologise to Kenzie for remarks made in Casa Amor. Kenzie shut it down cold. Corbin and Parmida then confirmed to each other they have no interest in exploring elsewhere.
drama.out: Corbin+Parmida locked. Kenzie+Corbin officially over forever.

rows.label: Arrivals
rows.tx: 11 original islanders enter (Vasana removed pre-villa).

rows.label: New Couples
rows.tx: Trinity+Bryce, Sean+Beatriz, Sincere+Melanie, Zach+Kenzie, KC+Aniya.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Gabriel left single as the odd man out.

rows.label: Arrivals
rows.tx: Bombshells Corbin Mims & Kayda Reese Bosse enter during the first challenge.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Corbin and Kayda target Kenzie and Zach.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Sincere & Melanie's arguments escalate, then settle.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Bombshells deepen connections; tension builds ahead of the recoupling.

rows.label: Recoupling
rows.tx: Girls' choice. Beatriz→Gabriel, Corbin→Kenzie, Kayda→Zach; Trinity+Bryce, Sincere+Melanie, KC+Aniya stay.

rows.label: Dumping
rows.tx: Sean left single and was dumped from the villa.

rows.label: New Couples
rows.tx: Gabriel+Beatriz, Corbin+Kenzie, Zach+Kayda formed.

rows.label: Arrivals
rows.tx: Triple bombshell: Sol Mýa, Jen Terry & Caleb McDaniel crash the slumber-party challenge.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Melanie's paint-challenge kiss with Corbin angers Sincere; KC's 'blessed' joke upsets Aniya.

rows.label: Vote
rows.tx: First public fan vote of the season announced.

rows.label: Vote
rows.tx: First public recoupling vote opens — fans pick partners for bombshells Caleb, Jen & Sol.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: The three bombshells stir up the freshly recoupled villa; couples brace for the results.

rows.label: Vote Delayed
rows.tx: America's Vote results held to Ep 9 after Love Island app technical issues.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Gabriel kisses both Jen & Sol and tells Beatriz; Bryce moves to pull Kayda, rattling Zach.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Kenzie kisses Caleb but says she was thinking of Corbin; Melanie nudges Sincere toward Sol.

rows.label: Recoupling
rows.tx: America's first vote: Caleb+Kenzie, Gabriel+Jen, Sincere+Sol — breaking three couples.

rows.label: Save
rows.tx: Corbin saved Melanie over Beatriz; the two couple up.

rows.label: Dumping
rows.tx: Beatriz Hatz dumped after landing in the bottom three and being passed over.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Dessert game of truths turns on Sol; Sincere & Melanie clear the air before the split.

rows.label: Aftersun
rows.tx: Weekend after-show recapping the vote fallout — no villa coupling changes.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Villa adjusts to the new couplings post-America's vote. Caleb and Kenzie navigate their fresh pairing while Corbin and Melanie find footing.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Tensions continue post-vote. Kenzie begins to question her feelings for Caleb vs. Corbin.

rows.label: Recoupling
rows.tx: Love Letter recoupling: islanders write letters to their chosen partner. Mutual letters auto-couple.

rows.label: New Couples
rows.tx: Kenzie chose Corbin over Caleb — Caleb gets paired with Sol. Trinity+Bryce, Kayda+Zach, KC+Aniya, Sincere+Melanie, Jen+Gabriel all stayed.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Caleb received no letter. Kenzie's letter to Corbin ends her vote-made pairing.

rows.label: Double Dump
rows.tx: Girls voted to dump Gabriel ('chasing every new arrival'). Boys voted to dump Sol after her explosive lecture to Sincere.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Sol's exit speech to Sincere: 'You pee on my leg and told me it's raining!' KC initially advocated to save Sol before Sincere cast the deciding vote.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Caleb and Jen both single; villa processes the double exit.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Jen shares her feelings with Caleb — both processing their losses.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Kayda explicitly tells single Caleb she's open to exploring a connection, rattling Zach.

rows.label: Aftersun
rows.tx: Week 3 Aftersun review. The Kayda/Caleb dynamic discussed.

rows.label: Casa Amor
rows.tx: Boys sneak to Casa Amor during 'Hearts on Fire' challenge — 6 new female bombshells await them.

rows.label: Bombshells
rows.tx: 12 male bombshells enter the main villa for the OG girls.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: The split is live — couples tested for the first time with physical separation and new temptations.

rows.label: Casa Amor
rows.tx: Main villa girls getting to know the 12 male bombshells; 'Temperatures Rising' challenge heats things up.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: KC and Tierra connect strongly; Corbin and Parmida develop chemistry; Caleb and Jaiden click immediately.

rows.label: Casa Amor
rows.tx: Casa Amor vs. main villa 'Temperatures Rising' game — boys and girls see limited glimpses of each other.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Kenzie connects strongly with Dylan; Jen gravitates toward Gal.

rows.label: Removal
rows.tx: Alannah Keyser removed from Casa Amor mid-week. No reason given on-air.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Melanie and Trinity hold firm in the main villa; both signal loyalty to their OG partners.

rows.label: Recoupling
rows.tx: Casa Amor ends. KC→Tierra (leaves Aniya single); Corbin→Parmida; Caleb→Jaiden; Jen chose Gal; Kenzie chose Dylan.

rows.label: Loyal
rows.tx: Trinity+Bryce, Sincere+Melanie, and Kayda+Zach all returned from Casa Amor single and loyal.

rows.label: Dumped (Casa)
rows.tx: Dumped from Casa Amor: Carl Schmidt, Chay Nehra, Corey Sawyer Jr., Ronnie Gunter (boys); Amora Cacheé, Sydney Eugene (girls).

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: KC and Tierra laughed at the firepit as Aniya cried and nearly had a panic attack.

rows.label: Aftersun
rows.tx: Casa Amor fallout discussed. Ciara Miller and Tefi Pessoa announce Movie Night is coming.

rows.label: Teaser
rows.tx: Movie Night announced for next week — islanders will watch unaired villa clips they didn't know existed.

rows.label: Twist
rows.tx: Megan Thee Stallion arrives with two islanders in a cake: Carl Schmidt and Amora Cacheé, voted back in by America.

rows.label: Connection
rows.tx: Carl reconnects with Aniya immediately — she cheered the loudest for his return.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Amora's return sparks unease around Sincere and Melanie. Sincere's body language noted by the villa.

rows.label: Official
rows.tx: Bryce asks Trinity to be his girlfriend on a jet ski date + sailboat champagne toast. She says yes.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Kenzie pulls Gal aside — they kiss. Gal+Jen messy split immediately follows.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Aniya publicly calls KC a coward; KC and Aniya officially done. KC stays with Tierra.

rows.label: Confirmed
rows.tx: Corbin and Parmida confirm exclusivity. Corbin's apology to Kenzie rejected cold.

rows.label: Pre-Movie Night
rows.tx: Villa on edge heading into Movie Night — Kenzie/Gal, KC/Casa Amor footage, Sincere/Amora all live wires.

trinity.c: Enters villa. Only woman to pick Bryce — first couple of the season.
Stays with Bryce at the recoupling.
Kisses every boy in the paint challenge before locking onto Bryce.
Couple with Bryce survives America's vote untouched.
Mutual love letter with Bryce at the Love Letter recoupling.
Casa Amor: holds firm — returns single and loyal.
Bryce asks Trinity to be his girlfriend — first official couple of S8.

bryce.c: Privately considers pulling Kayda — his first wandering eye.
Casa Amor: stays loyal, returns single.
Asks Trinity to be his girlfriend on a jet ski/sailboat date. She says yes.

gabriel.c: Chosen by Beatriz at the recoupling — first couple.
Kisses BOTH Jen and Sol, then admits it to Beatriz.
America's vote couples him with Jen — Beatriz dumped.
Mutual love letter with Jen — stays.
Dumped by the girls' vote — 'always chasing the next arrival.' Leaves with Jen single.

beatriz.c: Voices fear Gabriel may chase a new arrival.
Her fear comes true — Gabriel tells her he kissed both new bombshells.
Dumped from the villa. Vote sent Gabriel to Jen; Corbin's save went to Melanie.

sincere.c: Enters villa. Wanted by Aniya & Melanie; picks Melanie.
Volatile arguments with Melanie, then reconcile.
Furious over Melanie's long kiss with Corbin in the challenge.
America's vote couples him with Sol.
Love Letter recoupling: mutual letter with Melanie — reunited.
Sol confronts him in an explosive exit speech: 'You pee on my leg and told me it's raining!' Boys vote her out.
Casa Amor: stays loyal, returns single.
Both he and Melanie returned loyal — one of the season's strongest loyalty stories.
Amora returns via Megan twist; Sincere's body language around her noted by the villa.

melanie.c: Enters villa. Chosen by Sincere over Aniya.
Drawn-out paint-challenge kiss with Corbin sparks drama.
Loses Sincere to Sol in the vote — then Corbin saves her.
Mutual love letter with Sincere — reunited.
Casa Amor: held firm despite Corey Sawyer Jr.'s pursuit. Returns loyal.
Both she and Sincere returned loyal from Casa Amor.
Amora returns — watching with one eye open.

kc.c: Enters villa. Coupled with Aniya (last two standing).
Safe — sails through the vote with Aniya untouched.
Casa Amor: connects strongly with Tierra. Chooses to bring her back over returning to Aniya.
Laughs with Tierra at the firepit as Aniya cries.
Aniya publicly calls him a coward and rejects him. He remains with Tierra.

aniya.c: Enters villa. Wanted Sincere; ends up with KC.
Casa Amor: stays loyal to KC despite Corey Sawyer Jr.'s interest.
KC chose Tierra over her. Devastated — near panic attack. Melanie tries to comfort her.
Carl returns via Megan twist. Aniya cheers loudest. The two begin reconnecting.
Publicly calls KC a coward and walks away. Begins building something with Carl.

zach.c: Loses Kenzie to Corbin; recouples with bombshell Kayda.
Kayda tells Caleb she's open to exploring — Zach confronts her.
Casa Amor: stays loyal, returns single.
Both he and Kayda returned loyal from Casa Amor — couple reaffirmed.

kayda.c: Tells single Caleb she's open to exploring something outside Zach. Zach confronts her.
Casa Amor: holds firm. Returns single and loyal to Zach.
Both she and Zach returned loyal — one of two fully loyal OG couples.

corbin.c: Enters as a bombshell during the first challenge.
Picks Kenzie first, breaking up Zach & Kenzie.
Loses Kenzie to Caleb in the vote; wins the save and picks Melanie over Beatriz.
Kenzie chooses Corbin in the Love Letter recoupling — reunited.
Casa Amor: connects with Parmida and brings her back.
Apologises to Kenzie for Casa Amor remarks — rejected cold. Confirms exclusivity with Parmida.

kenzie.c: Chosen by bombshell Corbin, ending her couple with Zach.
America's vote couples her with Caleb.
Love Letter: chooses Corbin over Caleb — Caleb gets Sol.
Casa Amor: connects with Dylan. Chooses Dylan at the recoupling over returning to Corbin.
Kisses Gal while coupled with Dylan — triggers Jen+Gal split and Dylan left single. Goes into Movie Night single.

sol.c: Enters as a bombshell. Singles out Corbin, KC & Sincere.
America's vote couples her with Sincere, her named favourite.
Love Letter: paired with Caleb after Kenzie chose Corbin.
Delivers nuclear exit speech to Sincere: 'You pee on my leg and told me it's raining!' Boys vote her out.

jen.c: Enters as a bombshell. 'Here to take one of their men.'
Mutual love letter with Gabriel — stays.
Casa Amor: chooses Gal. Enters main villa as a couple.
Gal kissed Kenzie. Messy split. Jen single going into Movie Night.

caleb.c: Enters as the night's third bombshell. Meets the girls right away.
America's vote couples him with Kenzie — his first real partner in the villa.
Kenzie chooses Corbin in the Love Letter. Caleb's mailbox is empty. Paired with Sol.
Kayda tells him she's open to exploring — but Casa Amor starts before anything happens.
Casa Amor: connects with Jaiden and brings her back.
Enters main villa with Jaiden as a settled new pairing.

sean.c: Left single after Beatriz picks Gabriel.
Dumped from the villa and sent home.

vasana.c: Removed from the cast before entering after racist videos surfaced.

gal.c: Enters Casa Amor as a bombshell. Connects with Jen during the split.
Jen chooses Gal at the Casa Amor recoupling. Enters main villa.
Kenzie pulls him aside — they kiss. Gal+Jen split immediately. Triangle with Kenzie and Dylan forming.

dylan.c: Enters Casa Amor as a bombshell. Connects with Kenzie during the split.
Kenzie chooses Dylan at the Casa Amor recoupling. Enters main villa.
Kenzie kisses Gal. Dylan left without a partner going into Movie Night.

jaiden.c: Enters Casa Amor as a bombshell. Catches Caleb's eye immediately.
Caleb brings Jaiden back to the main villa at the recoupling.
Quietly building something genuine with Caleb.

parmida.c: Enters Casa Amor as a bombshell. Corbin drawn to her directness.
Corbin brings Parmida back to the main villa over returning single.
Both confirm exclusive intent — no interest in exploring elsewhere.

tierra.c: Enters Casa Amor as a bombshell. Connects strongly with KC.
KC chose Tierra over loyal Aniya. They enter the main villa. KC and Tierra laughed at the firepit over Aniya's tears.
Aniya publicly rejects KC. Tierra remains by his side.

carl.c: Enters Casa Amor as a bombshell. Connected with Aniya's energy; wasn't chosen at recoupling.
Dumped at the Casa Amor recoupling.
America votes Carl back in via Megan Thee Stallion's twist. Walks into the main villa; Aniya cheers loudest.
Carl and Aniya begin building a genuine connection. Aniya publicly rejects KC.

amora.c: Enters Casa Amor as a bombshell. Confident and unapologetic.
Dumped at the Casa Amor recoupling — no boy picked her to return.
America votes Amora back in via Megan Thee Stallion's twist. Returns with unfinished business.
Her presence stirs unease around Sincere and Melanie. A Movie Night wildcard.
